tweets.text: BREAKING: Arne Slot writes an emotional open letter as he says goodbye to Liverpool 🚨
Who is ready for the 2026 World Cup? 🍿 🏆

"We have help from Team GB and specialists all over the world to help players adapt."

Thomas Tuchel on his squad getting accumulated with high temperatures and humidity at the World Cup 🥵

"They care so much, we had beautiful reactions, even from players who weren't called up."

England head coach Thomas Tuchel discusses the strong "connection" within his squad with the World Cup around the corner 🏆

Video assistant referees will have new powers to intervene at this summer's World Cup if fouls are committed immediately before the ball is in play at set-pieces, the International Football Association Board has announced ⚽️
BREAKING: The Metropolitan Police have released a statement on X confirming arrests at Arsenal's parade.
BREAKING: Crystal Palace are preparing to move on to alternative targets with Andoni Iraola set for formal discussions with Liverpool about their vacant managerial role 👔

"We knew it was going to be tough"

Fran Kirby reacts to Brighton's Women's FA Cup final defeat to Manchester City 🗣️

"I've always said that Manchester is home" 🩵

Bunny Shaw reacts to Man City winning the Women's FA Cup and committing her long-term future to the club 🤝
The Champions League team of the season has been announced ⚽️
BREAKING: Liverpool have confirmed that Ibrahima Konaté will leave the club this summer 🚨

"I am so proud of the boys" 🗣️

Myles Lewis-Skelly on Arsenal's Premier League title win and how their loss in the Champions League final will add fuel to the side's fire 🔴

"22 years Arsenal fans have waited for this."

Celebrations are flowing in north London! 🔴
